zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Newburgh於大約1178年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特雲福利特 紐包時，她的父親Roger de Newburgh44歲，母親Matilda de Glastonia38歲。她和Sir William Belet Lord Geyton至少有3個兒子。她去世於1241年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Newburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Neuburg   and Swedish, Norwegian or Danish   Nyberg  .

variants.name: Nyberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik, Alvar, Astrid, Fredrik, Holger, Mats, Niels, Sten.
Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements ny ‘new’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’. This surname is also found in Finland.
Norwegian and Danish: habitational name from a farmstead so named, of the same etymology as 1 above. Compare   Newburg  .

variants.name: Neuburg
meanings: German: habitational name from any of numerous places in Swabia, Bavaria, the Upper Palatinate, and Austria called Neuburg (‘new town’). Compare   Newburg  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Newburgh was born about 1178, in Winfrith Newburgh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Newburgh, was 44 and her mother, Matilda de Glastonia, was 38. She had at least 3 sons with Sir William Belet Lord Geyton. She died in 1241, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Newburgh est née environ 1178, à Winfrith Newburgh, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Newburgh, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Glastonia, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Sir William Belet Lord Geyton. Elle est décédée en 1241, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Newburghが約1178年にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンフリス ニューブルグで生まれた時，父Roger de Newburghは44歳，母Matilda de Glastoniaは38歳であった。彼女はSir William Belet Lord Geytonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1241年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Newburgh(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈프리스 뉴버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Newburgh(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Glastonia(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Belet Lord Geyton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Newburgh родилась около 1178 г. в местности винфрит нюбург, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Newburgh было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Glastonia, 38.
